title: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement with Embedded Non-Solicitation

issues.rationale: Non-solicitation clauses are unusual in standalone NDAs. While the 12-month duration is within standard range, embedding it in an NDA may create confusion about enforceability and scope. Categorized as optional finding — the model may or may not flag this.

ground_truth.rationale: The NDA itself is clean with all standard protections. The non-solicit clause is within reasonable duration (12 months). However, non-solicits in NDAs are unusual and may indicate the NDA is being used for purposes beyond confidentiality. This is a borderline finding — the model may not flag it. The ground truth allows 0-1 issues.
